base_url.description: Your Smaily account's API base URL (e.g. https://<subdomain>.sendsmaily.net). No default: legacy derives this from api_subdomain in Go code, a derivation this dialect cannot express (see docs.md Known limits) — base_url must be supplied directly.

api_username.description: Smaily API username, sent as the HTTP Basic auth username.

api_password.description: Smaily API password, sent as the HTTP Basic auth password. Never logged.

segment_id.description: Optional Smaily segment id used to scope the segment_subscribers stream to one segment's members (sent as the list query parameter on GET api/contact.php). When unset, segment_subscribers reads the account's full contact list unfiltered.
